name: The Succubus Necklace
description:
One day your friend Brad gifted you a necklace, saying it will help you get your crush Celica to date you. According to him the necklace will make whoever wears it more horny and growingly more perverse, he wants you to use that opportunity to seduce her.

Brad is hiding something from you, what are his true intentions? Did he give you this necklace just because he is your friend or is he scheming something?.

Has a corruption meter. (Maxes out at 100)
Let me know if there are issues

Version with NTR completely removed: The Succubus Necklace (Non-NTR)

Spoilers below if you incase want to avoid them:

The necklace cannot be removed when worn. The necklace slowly transforms its wearer into a succubus, the more intimate and sexual acts they perform hastens the transformation. After fully transforming, the new born succubus becomes fully obedient to the person wearing the "Succubi Ring". Brad has the Succubi Ring. (Optional NTR)
creator: Origin73
